response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify scenes. 2. Identified 'Boku no Hikouki' (Song 1) and 'Silent Flame, Never Fade' (Song 2) through visual cues. 3. Searched for lyrics for both. 'Silent Flame, Never Fade' lyrics found. 'Boku no Hikouki' lyrics were not found in the search results provided. 4. Constructed the JSON object with the detected scenes and found lyrics.
response.global_summary: VTuber Shiranui Flare performs her original song "Boku no Hikouki", followed by a talk segment where she introduces and performs her new song, "Silent Flame, Never Fade".

scenes.description: The video begins with a stage setup and an introductory greeting by Shiranui Flare.
Shiranui Flare performs the song 'Boku no Hikouki'. The title '僕の飛行機' is shown on-screen.
Talk segment where Shiranui Flare interacts with the audience, discusses her performance, and promotes her new song, 'Silent Flame, Never Fade'.
Shiranui Flare performs her new song, 'Silent Flame, Never Fade'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
静かに揺れ続ける焔(ほのお)
名もなき道照らし出す
失くしていた未来さえ
いまあなたと新たな明日を刻んだ

いくつもの夜を超えて
紡いできた自分らしさ
選択したその全てが
私をまた突き動かす

強がってた訳じゃなくて
止まることが怖かったよ
迷っていたあの日もきっと
今のチカラになってるよ

一人きりだと思っても
気づけばそこにある笑顔が
私といつも一緒に歩いてくれてた
その意味そのチカラ絶対に離さない！

加速していくこの想いは
いま翼を纏い出す
私が私でいれる
それだけで十分だから

逃げないって決めたのは
強くなったからじゃない
私を呼ぶその声と
重ね合った信じる世界の明日を

傷つくこと躊躇ってた
立ち止まったこともあった
そんな時にこの背中を
押してくれたその眼差し

迷いながら選んだ道
間違いさえ真実だと
その焔は闇を照らして私に正しさをくれた

張り裂けそうに痛んでも
この胸に刻んだ勇気が
私をいつも支えてくれていたから
今ここに感じ合う
あなたと私の夢

燃え尽きることの無い夢は
この大空に羽ばたいて
涙さえも輝かせ
誰かの夜を照らしたい

逃げないって決めたのは
強くなったからじゃない
静かな焔(ほのお)を抱いて
何度だって立ち上がれること知ったから

たとえ世界が色を失くし
光が遠ざかっても
この名に刻む焔(ほむら)は
あなたと私を繋いで

逃げないって決めたのは
強くなったからじゃない
私を呼ぶその声と
重ね合った信じる世界の明日を
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Quietly swaying, the flame continues to burn
Lighting up the nameless road
Even the future I had lost
Now, with you, I have carved out a new tomorrow

Crossing through so many nights
Spinning my own identity
Every choice I've made
Is pushing me forward once again

It wasn't that I was trying to act tough
I was just afraid to stop
Even that day I was lost, surely
It's becoming my strength now

Even if I think I'm all alone
If I notice, the smile there
Was always walking with me
I will never let go of that meaning, that strength!

This accelerating feeling
Now starts to wrap its wings
Just being able to be myself
That's enough for me

Deciding not to run away
It's not because I became strong
With the voice calling me
And the tomorrow of the world we believe in, overlapped

I hesitated to get hurt
There were times I stood still
At such times, that gaze
That pushed my back

The path I chose while lost
Even the mistakes are the truth
That flame illuminated the darkness and gave me correctness

Even if it hurts to the point of tearing apart
The courage carved in this chest
Was always supporting me
Now, here, we feel each other
Your dream and mine

The dream that never burns out
Flaps its wings in this vast sky
Making even tears shine
I want to illuminate someone's night

Deciding not to run away
It's not because I became strong
Embracing the quiet flame
I learned that I can stand up any number of times

Even if the world loses its color
Even if the light fades away
This flame carved in this name
Connects you and me

Deciding not to run away
It's not because I became strong
With the voice calling me
And the tomorrow of the world we believe in, overlapped
